payload.answer: This appears to be a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event, not a new memory to save twice.
repair_options: Ignore the duplicate Slack event and make no memory change.
Treat this as a retry of the same event ID and do not add another copy.
Ask the user to confirm only if the duplicate event content differs from the original.
